text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking along the<n>riverbank...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... Excuse me, do you have a<n>moment?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Could I ask you to time my run? It's<n>hard for me
to do it on my own...
choice_data_list: Sure! Now run as fast as you can!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much. I appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I help Silence Suzuka train, I'm<n>completely
blown away by her<n>incredible speed.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
As fast as I can? Okay. I'll do my<n>best, so please
be sure to get my time.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka races past me at an<n>astounding
speed... then disappears<n>into the distance.
